Body.Content:
This feature allows users to subscribe to notifications for Viva Engage topics they follow. Users will receive a Viva Engage bell notification when a new post is tagged with a topic they are subscribed to or when the topic is added to an existing post.

GA date: September CY2024

message.Title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Engage - Topic Subscription notification
